heading: Definition of “fiduciary”
label: 5506 Definition of “fiduciary”
notes: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the seventh month beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(a) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title
amendments: Effective DateSection effective on the first day of the seventh month beginning after , see , set out as an Effective Date of 2004 Amendment note under .Dec. 10, 2004section 507(a) of Pub. L. 108–454section 5312 of this title

children.text: a person who is a guardian, curator, conservator, committee, or person legally vested with the responsibility or care of a claimant (or a claimant’s estate) or of a beneficiary (or a beneficiary’s estate); or

any other person having been appointed in a representative capacity to receive money paid under any of the laws administered by the Secretary for the use and benefit of a minor, incompetent, or other beneficiary.
